CreateInstanceBySpec.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password in the image. Default: false. true: use the preset password; false: do not use it. If true, password and keypairId must be empty. Only custom or shared images are supported.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bccCreateWithScript: Automation script to execute when creating a BCC instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.name: Instance name (optional). If specified, used as prefix in batch creation with auto-generated suffix in format: name{-index}. If not specified, auto-generated as: {instance-8charRandom-index}. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_/. special characters; must start with a letter; length 1–65.
CreateInstanceBySpec.cpuThreadConfig: Number of threads per physical core (vCPU), controlling whether hyper-threading is enabled. Valid values: 1 or 2. Default is 2. Only supported on bare-metal instances with Intel Gen 7+ or AMD Gen 3+ processors.
CreateInstanceBySpec.numaConfig: NUMA configuration for the CPU. Intel platform: 0=disabled, 1=enabled. AMD platform: controls NPS (Nodes Per Socket), values 0/1/2/4/auto corresponding to NPS0/NPS1/NPS2/NPS4/auto. Default is NUMA enabled (Intel) or NPS1 (AMD). Only supported on bare-metal instances with Intel Gen 7+ or AMD Gen 3+.
CreateInstanceBySpec.hostname: Instance hostname (optional). If specified, used as prefix in batch creation with auto-generated suffix. If not specified, auto-generated as: {instance-8charRandom-index}. Only lowercase letters, digits, and -. are allowed; must start with a letter; no consecutive or leading/trailing special characters; length 2–64.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoSeqSuffix: Whether to auto-generate sequential suffixes for name and hostname. true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenHostnameDomain: Whether to auto-generate hostname domain. true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.adminPass: Administrator password for the instance. 8–32 characters, must contain at least three of: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, special characters. Allowed special characters: ()`~!@#$%^&*-_+=\|{}[]:;'<>,.?/. Must be transmitted encrypted.
CreateInstanceBySpec.keypairId: ID of the key pair to bind to the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame. Default: false. true: enable, false: disable. Only supported on plans that support Jumbo Frame.
CreateInstanceBySpec.userData: User data passed to the instance if it meets the usage requirements. UserData is not encrypted during API transmission; avoid passing sensitive information in plaintext. If necessary, encrypt and Base64-encode it before passing.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deletionProtection: Instance release protection. 0: disabled (default), 1: enabled. When enabled, manual release of the instance is prohibited.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoRenewTimeUnit: Required if auto-renewal is enabled; otherwise leave empty. Unit: "month" for monthly, "year" for yearly.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoRenewTime: Required if auto-renewal is enabled; otherwise leave empty. Duration: 1–9 for monthly, 1–5 for yearly.
CreateInstanceBySpec.hosteyeType: Host security type, effective when isOpenHostEye is true. "enterprise": enterprise edition; "open" or omitted: basic edition.
CreateInstanceBySpec.dataPartitionType: Data disk file system format. Options: xfs, ext4.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootPartitionType: System disk file system format. Options: xfs, ext4.
CreateInstanceBySpec.cdsAutoRenew: [Deprecated, CDS auto-renewal follows BCC] Whether CDS auto-renews. true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList: List of CDS disks to create.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.storageType: CDS disk storage type. Options: SSD_Enhanced, cloud_hp1, hp1 (default), hdd.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk size in GB. Must be a positive integer, range 0–5120 GB.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.snapshotId: Snapshot ID for creating a disk from a snapshot. Disk size must not be smaller than the snapshot.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.deleteWithInstance: Delete disk when instance is released. Effective only for pay-as-you-go billing. Default: false. Requires cdsAttributeActive=true when releasing via V2 API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete auto snapshots when the disk is released.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.name: Disk name.
CreateInstanceBySpec.imageId: Image ID for the instance. Obtain from the image list API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.spec: Instance spec, e.g. bcc.g7.c2m8. Obtain from the instance spec list API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bidModel: Spot instance bid model. "market": market price, "custom": custom price.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bidPrice: Spot instance bid price in CNY/minute. If custom bid is below market price, creation is not allowed. Effective only when bidModel='custom'.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskSizeInGb: System disk size in GB. Linux default: 20 GB, range [10, 2048]; Windows default: 40 GB, range [40, 2048]. Must meet the minimum disk requirement of the selected image.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskExtraIo: Extra I/O performance for the root disk.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskStorageType: System disk type. Default: hp1 (high-performance cloud disk). See StorageType for available options.
CreateInstanceBySpec.networkCapacityInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For prepaid or bandwidth-billed postpaid EIPs: standard BGP 1–500, enhanced BGP 100–5000. For traffic-billed postpaid EIPs: standard BGP 1–200 (peak bandwidth). 0 means no public IP is allocated. Default: 0.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ehcClusterId: Optional parameter for creating RoCE instances. If empty, the default EHC cluster is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.purchaseCount: Number of instances to create in batch. Must be a positive integer. Default: 1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.purchaseMinCount: Minimum number of instances to create in batch.
CreateInstanceBySpec.dedicatedHostId: Dedicated host ID for specifying instance placement.
CreateInstanceBySpec.relationTag: Whether to apply tags to associated resources (CDS, EIP, snapshots, snapshot chains). Default: false.
CreateInstanceBySpec.fileSystems: List of CFS file systems to mount on the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.fileSystems.protocol: CFS file system protocol. Options: nfs, smb.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks: Local disks for the instance. DCC instances support multiple local disks with specified type and size. Other BCC types support at most one local disk using the default type with specified size. FPGA and GPU instances use one local disk by default.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks.storageType: Local disk storage type. Options: SSD_Enhanced, cloud_hp1, hp1 (default), hdd.
CreateInstanceBySpec.securityGroupId: Deprecated. Security group ID. If empty, the default security group is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs. If empty, the default security group is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: List of enterprise security group IDs. If specified, securityGroupIds is ignored. If empty, the default security group is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.subnetId: Subnet ID. If empty, the default subnet is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deployId: Deployment set ID for the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deployIdList: List of deployment set IDs for the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.eniIds: List of ENI short IDs to attach. In batch creation, ENIs are evenly distributed across instances; the total count must be a multiple of the instance count, and per-instance ENI count must not exceed the maximum. Not supported for EBC bare-metal instances. Maximum 5000 ENI IDs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.disableRootDiskSerial: Whether to hide the system disk serial number. Default: false. true: hide, false: show.
CreateInstanceBySpec.zoneName: Availability zone name, e.g. "cn-bj-a" for Beijing Zone A. Obtain from the zone list API. Dedicated instances use the zone of the dedicated host; this field is not required for them.
CreateInstanceBySpec.resGroupId: Resource group ID to bind to the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether the postpaid EIP bound to the instance is automatically released when the instance is released. true: yes, false: no. Default: false. Effective only for bandwidth- or traffic-billed EIPs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.networkPurchaseType: EIP line type. Options: standard BGP (BGP) or enhanced BGP (BGP_S). Default: BGP.
CreateInstanceBySpec.instanceType: Instance type. See InstanceType for options. If empty, the default instance type is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.internetChargeType: Public bandwidth billing method. See internetChargeType for options. Default follows BCC billing: prepaid defaults to monthly/yearly by bandwidth; postpaid defaults to billing by bandwidth usage.
CreateInstanceBySpec.eipName: Public IP name. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, -_/. If not specified, a name is auto-generated.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security. true: enable, false: disable. Default: enabled.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enableHt: Whether to enable HT (for EBC). Default: true. true: enable, false: disable.
CreateInstanceBySpec.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method. Options: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding (spot instance).
CreateInstanceBySpec.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Required for prepaid; not needed for postpaid.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 for the instance. Requires both the image and subnet to support IPv6. true: enable, false: disable. If not specified, auto-adapts based on image and subnet IPv6 support.
